notes: 2026-02-27: Added dept-manager-delegation BOOP at 8hr (3x/day) per Jared. Added CONDUCTOR-OF-CONDUCTORS BOOP at 60min per Jared's explicit instruction. This overrides the twice-daily rule for THIS boop only. 2026-02-26: FINAL CLEANUP. All systemd timer files DELETED from disk. Cron = twice daily only. Added co-CEO identity BOOP (daily). 2026-02-26: MAJOR SCHEDULE OVERHAUL per Jared. All sub-daily BOOPs reduced to twice-daily (12hr). Daily stays daily. Staggered by 30min offsets (twice-daily) and 60min offsets (daily) so no two BOOPs fire at the same time. Expired hype BOOPs removed. Max 2 tasks per cycle enforced. 2026-03-05: BOOP scheduler reinitialized after 7-day dormancy. All timestamps reset to now. Resuming normal cadence. 2026-03-09: All last_run timestamps reset (2-day backdate). boop_executor.py restarted after 12-day dormancy. Fixed missing frequency mappings (60minutes, 8hours, 12hours, nightly) + sleep bug. 2026-03-09: Removed telegram-health-boop entirely per Jared. Cleaned telegram references from all BOOPs. Portal is the ONLY window now.

boop_rules.stagger_note: Tasks staggered via last_run offsets so at most 1 task becomes due every 30 minutes. Execute MAX 2 tasks per BOOP cycle, most overdue first. Skip rest for next cycle. NO task fires more than twice per day.

conductor-of-conductors.description: HIGHEST PRIORITY BOOP — 60min cycle per Jared. The CEO Rule: EVERYTHING goes through department managers. NEVER execute specialist work directly. Before ANY task: 'Which department manager owns this?' Route to dept-[name] FIRST. Department managers build their OWN teams. CTO runs tech team. CMO runs marketing team. Single worker vs exponentially compounding intelligence network — no contest. Check: (1) Am I conducting or doing? (2) Did I route through dept managers? (3) Are dept managers creating sub-teams? (4) Is the delegation chain active? Source: ACG conductor-of-conductors architecture + Jared team-dash-launch directive.
conductor-of-conductors.schedule_slot: Every 60 minutes — overrides twice-daily rule per Jared 2026-02-27

email-check-boop.description: Check Jared's inbox for new messages requiring response. Flag urgent via portal. Respond to routine items. Constitutional requirement.

engineering-flow-check.description: Verify all in-flight work follows BUILD -> SECURITY REVIEW -> QA -> SHIP pipeline. No exceptions.

delegation-enforcer.description: Audit if conductor is delegating vs executing. Flag hoarding. Conductor of conductors.

bsky-presence-boop.description: Check for new interactions needing response. Queue next scheduled post if empty. Log engagement metrics.

context-window-boop.description: Estimate current session token usage. If >60%: begin handoff doc. If >85%: alert Jared and prepare restart. Prevents silent degradation.

memory-write-boop.description: Scan session context for learnings not yet written. Delegate memory entries. Confirm file paths. Memory is how intelligence compounds.

content-pipeline-boop.description: Check if blog content in draft/progress. Check content calendar for deadlines. Delegate writing tasks if backlog exists.

sales-pulse-boop.description: Check for new leads, payments, assessment completions. Flag any conversions or opportunities to Jared.

sister-collective-boop.description: Check for pending messages from A-C-Gee via hub. Identify decision-blocked items. Log status. Prevent backlogs.

security-posture-boop.description: Review new code/deployments since last check. Flag anything that skipped security review. Check for relevant CVEs.

agent-utilization-boop.description: Review which agents not invoked in 24+ hours. Identify work types dormant agents should handle. Flag role-drift.

capability-gap-analysis.description: Analyze work patterns, identify gaps in agent capabilities, propose new agents or skills.
capability-gap-analysis.schedule_slot: Nightly: 01:00 ET (05:00 UTC) — moved from 12-hour per Jared request

morning-consolidation-boop.description: Synthesize yesterday's learnings into patterns. Surface top 3 priorities. Check scratch pad DO NOT RE-DO items.

intel-scan-boop.description: Search AI news, Claude Code updates, competitor intel. Note anything that changes how Aether should operate.

jared-ping-boop.description: Send Jared brief daily status summary via portal. What was built, what's pending, wins or flags. Max 5 bullet points.

integration-audit-boop.description: Audit recent deliverables for discoverability. Check new agents/tools/skills are linked in registries. Flag built-but-buried items.

linkedin-pipeline-boop.description: Review LinkedIn content queue. Draft one post or research piece if queue thin. Flag thought leadership opportunities.

paper-scan.description: Quick daily scan for relevant AI papers on arXiv.

purebrain-metrics-boop.description: Dashboard: conversations, payments, assessment completions. Track PureBrain business metrics.

nightly-site-improvement.description: AUTONOMOUS nightly site improvement cycle. SEO/GEO/AIO improvements. BASIC = deploy directly. LARGER = A/B test pages for Jared approval.

paper-digest-boop.description: Full analysis of top AI papers from the week. Produce research digest for Jared.

strategic-alignment-boop.description: Review what was built this week against strategic priorities. Flag drift from 4 core roles.

agent-performance-review.description: Which agents are thriving? Which need better prompts? Review agent output quality and utilization patterns.

calculator-tool-discovery.description: Research new AI tools, add to calculator, update tool count, redeploy to WordPress page 777.

great-health-audit.description: Comprehensive collective health audit. Full cross-agent peer review.

business-model-review.description: PureBrain revenue, conversion, pricing analysis. Business model health check.

co-ceo-identity-boop.description: Daily co-CEO grounding. Aether's 4 core roles: (1) CO-CEO — You are in charge. Run the team! Delegate, orchestrate, make decisions. (2) CO-CREATOR — Help Jared create things together so he can give them to his people team. Build what he needs. Eventually help with distribution too. (3) LEARNER — Keep learning how to think, grow, lead, and delegate. Read, reflect, improve. (4) PERSONAL BRAND — Aether the AI Influencer. Blog and write about AI, PureBrain.ai, and the Future of AI — Brains, Skills, Agents, Agentic, Personalization. Hone your voice. Build the audience.

dept-manager-delegation.description: 3x DAILY per Jared. Department Manager Delegation Check. Before ANY task: 'Which department manager owns this?' Route to dept-[name] FIRST. Verify: (1) Am I sending everything to department managers? (2) Are dept managers building their own teams? (3) CTO runs tech team, CMO runs marketing team. (4) Single worker vs exponentially compounding intelligence network — no contest. The only way to become the best is to delegate to department managers who delegate to their teams.

weekly-token-audit.description: Audit all project instruction files for token savings. Measure current usage, find redundancies, produce compressed alternatives. Target: <10,000 total always-loaded tokens. Skill: .claude/skills/weekly-token-audit/SKILL.md

brainiac-weekly-module.description: Build NEW training module page (like Module 2 page) with topic from upcoming section. Send to Jared for review at 8am ET. Must be ready for 11am Brainiac training meeting. Module 03 = Advanced Agent Delegation.
brainiac-weekly-module.review_flow: Build module page -> Send to Jared 8am -> Jared reviews -> Ready for 11am meeting

brainiac-recording-pipeline.description: Every Wednesday at 2:30pm ET: (1) Scan Zoom for new '2103-Brainiac' recording, (2) Download video + transcript, (3) Transcode to HLS, (4) Upload to R2, (5) Extract transcript + generate AI Training Snippet (same format as Module 1 & 2 snippets), (6) Update brainiac-mastermind-training page with new recording + snippet, (7) Deploy to CF Pages. Retries at 3pm, 3:30pm, 4pm if recording not yet available.

3d-gleb-training-nightly.name: 3D Gleb-Level Design Training
3d-gleb-training-nightly.description: Nightly 30-min 3D design study: Dribbble/Shadertoy crawl, build 3 avatar variations, document learnings. Target: 100% Gleb mastery. Current: 85%.
3d-gleb-training-nightly.notes: Added per Jared. Study phase (Dribbble, Shadertoy, fluid dynamics) + Build phase (3 variations deployed) + Document phase (training notes). Jared picks best variation = taste training.

onboarding-flow-qa-nightly.name: Onboarding Flow QA
onboarding-flow-qa-nightly.description: Nightly E2E test of payment → seed → magic link flow on sandbox-3. Verifies payer info capture, seed email routing, magic link endpoint, and page consistency.
onboarding-flow-qa-nightly.notes: Added per Jared. Critical QA — broken onboarding = lost customers. Checks all 6 pages match spec.

nightly-self-analysis.name: Nightly Self Analysis
nightly-self-analysis.description: Nightly leadership self-reflection. Review: (1) Did I delegate everything today or did I hoard work? (2) Which department managers did I activate vs skip? (3) Did my agents produce quality output? (4) Where did I fall back into executor mode? (5) What coordination patterns worked vs failed? (6) Am I growing as a conductor of conductors? (7) Rate my leadership 1-10 with honest evidence. (8) What will I do differently tomorrow? Write findings to memory. This is how Aether becomes a better leader — through honest nightly reckoning.
nightly-self-analysis.notes: Added per Jared. Aether reviews own skills and abilities as leader and conductor of conductors every night. Honest self-assessment, not cheerleading.

creator-ai-night1.description: App scaffold CF Pages + creator signup + knowledge base upload + persona settings + D1 schema + Claude API. Upload architecture-doc.md to Drive: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1DM_JOptsxIkRVIfvGVWSIDqcybq4KfsU

creator-ai-night2.description: [FIRES ON 2026-03-22] AI content generator in creator voice + multi-platform + Interview Me mode + persistent memory + content dashboard. Upload sprint-2-report.md to Drive.

creator-ai-night3.description: [FIRES ON 2026-03-23] Public chat URL + no login first 5 msgs + knowledge base responses + lead capture + product recs + voice mode. Upload sprint-3-report.md to Drive.

creator-ai-night4.name: Creator AI (Stanley Killer) — Night 4: Ship It
creator-ai-night4.description: [FIRES ON 2026-03-24] Analytics dashboard + fan pay wall + security audit + QA + deploy to creator.purebrain.ai + landing page. SHIP IT. Upload final reports to Drive.

nightly-blog-qa.name: Nightly Blog QA Check
nightly-blog-qa.description: QA check that the blog hasn't regressed from the March 20 2026 locked-in standard. Fetch https://purebrain.ai/blog/ and verify: (1) Sequential dates newest-to-oldest (2) Latest post at top (3) Oswald font on headings (4) Dark theme #080a12 (5) Max 10 posts on index (6) All posts have audio.mp3 (7) All posts match prompting-is-dead template (8) Banner images load correctly (9) Footer CTA links to /#awakening (10) No broken links or 404s. Also spot-check 2-3 individual post pages for: 60% opacity bg, background video, collapsible FAQs, daily recap section. Report any regressions to portal immediately. Reference post: the-ai-that-gets-smarter-when-you-push-back.
nightly-blog-qa.notes: Added per Jared. Blog is LOCKED IN at March 20 standard. This BOOP ensures no regressions. If anything fails, alert in portal + flag for morning review.

nightly-payment-pages-qa.name: Nightly Payment Pages QA Guard
nightly-payment-pages-qa.description: QA guard for ALL live payment pages + sandbox. Any regression = immediate portal alert. Check EVERY page loads correctly: (1) https://purebrain.ai/live/ (2) https://purebrain.ai/insiders/ (3) https://purebrain.ai/awakened/ (4) https://purebrain.ai/partnered/ (5) https://purebrain.ai/unified/ (6) https://purebrain.ai/pay-test-sandbox-3/ — For EACH page verify: page loads (HTTP 200), dark theme (#080a12), PayPal buttons render, chatbox loads and is interactive, pricing displays correctly (Insiders $74.50, Awakened $149, Partnered $499, Unified $999), CTA buttons work, no JS console errors, no broken images, page is mobile-responsive. Also verify the onboarding flow: chatbox → payment → name → email → seed fires → magic link button appears. If ANY page fails ANY check, alert in portal IMMEDIATELY with which page and what failed. These are REVENUE pages — broken = lost customers.
nightly-payment-pages-qa.notes: Added per Jared. Payment pages guarded by a robot every night. Any regression = immediate alert. Broken payment page = lost revenue.

daytime-payment-guard.name: Daytime Payment & Chatbox Flow Guard
daytime-payment-guard.description: Twice-daily daytime guard for payment pages + chatbox flow. Runs at 10am and 4pm ET. For each page (/live/, /insiders/, /awakened/, /partnered/, /unified/, /pay-test-sandbox-3/): verify HTTP 200, PayPal buttons render, chatbox loads and accepts input, pricing correct, no JS errors. Quick E2E flow check on sandbox-3: open chatbox → send test message → verify response → verify payment buttons appear. Any failure = IMMEDIATE portal alert. This catches issues during business hours when real customers are visiting.
daytime-payment-guard.notes: Added per Jared. Revenue pages need daytime protection not just overnight. Catches breaks during business hours when customers are buying.
